mapper.sql: goodsId, storeId, barCode, name, price, style, total, remark, createdDate
mapper.insert:
insert into store_goods
goodsId,
storeId,
barCode,
name,
price,
style,
total,
remark,
createdDate,
#{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{barCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{style,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{total,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update store_goods
storeId = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
barCode = #{barCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
style = #{style,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
total = #{total,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where goodsId = #{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update store_goods set storeId = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, barCode = #{barCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, style = #{style,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, total = #{total,jdbcType=INTEGER}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where goodsId = #{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
